<style id="wp-custom-css">
/* AlphaSignal Minimalist: Light-Leak Text Effect */
.menu-button-highlight a {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-weight: 900 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    
    /* Elegant Desktop Defaults */
    font-size: 12px !important;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    padding: 0 15px !important;

    /* The "Shiny" Gradient Text Effect */
    background: linear-gradient(
        to right, 
        #ffffff 20%, 
        #888888 40%, 
        #ffffff 60%
    );
    background-size: 200% auto;
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    animation: shine-text 4s linear infinite;
}

/* MOBILE SPECIFIC FIX */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .menu-button-highlight a {
        font-size: 16px !important;      /* Larger for mobile readability */
        letter-spacing: 1px !important;  /* Tighter spacing so it fits on one line */
        padding: 10px 0 !important;      /* More vertical space to tap easily */
        -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff !important; /* Static white on mobile for better visibility */
        animation: none !important;      /* Disable animation on mobile to save battery/CPU */
    }
}

/* The subtle shine animation */
@keyframes shine-text {
    to { background-position: 200% center; }
}

/* Hover: Stop the animation and glow */
.menu-button-highlight a:hover {
    -webkit-text-fill-color: #ffffff;
    text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
    transform: scale(1.02);
}

/* Perfect alignment */
.menu-button-highlight {
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    height: 100%;
}


</style>

  /** Common styles across all window sizes. */
  .swg-dialog,
  .swg-toast {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 1) !important;
  }

  .swg-toast {
    position: fixed !important;
    bottom: 0 !important;
    max-height: 46px !important;
    z-index: 2147483647 !important;
    border: none !important;
  }

  /**
  * Wide desktop screen support, when width is >= 871px and height is >= 641px.
  */
  @media (min-width: 871px) and (min-height: 641px) {
    .swg-dialog.swg-wide-dialog {
      left: -435px !important;
    }

    .swg-dialog.swg-wide-dialog,
    .swg-toast {
      width: 870px !important;
    }
  }

  /** Tablet/Medium screen support, when width OR height is <= 640px. */
  @media (max-width: 640px), (max-height: 640px) {
    .swg-dialog,
    .swg-toast {
      width: 480px !important;
      left: -240px !important;
      margin-inline-start: calc(100vw - 100vw / 2) !important;
      border-top-left-radius: 8px !important;
      border-top-right-radius: 8px !important;
      box-shadow:
        rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.3) 0 1px 1px,
        rgba(60, 64, 67, 0.15) 0 1px 4px 1px !important;
    }

    [dir='rtl'] .swg-dialog,
    [dir='rtl'] .swg-toast {
      margin-inline-start: calc(100vw - 100vw / 2 - 240px) !important;
    }
  }

  /** Desktop/Large screen support, when width AND height are >= 641px. */
  @media (min-width: 641px) and (min-height: 641px) {
    .swg-dialog,
    .swg-toast {
      width: 630px !important;
    }

    .swg-dialog {
      left: -315px !important;
      margin-inline-start: calc(100vw - 100vw / 2) !important;
      background-color: transparent !important;
      border: none !important;
    }

    [dir='rtl'] .swg-dialog {
      margin-inline-start: calc(100vw - 100vw / 2 - 315px) !important;
    }

    .swg-toast {
      border-radius: 4px !important;
      bottom: 8px !important;
      box-shadow:
        0 3px 1px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%),
        0 2px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 14%),
        0 1px 5px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 12%) !important;
      left: 8px !important;
    }
  }

  /** Phone/Small screen support, when width is <= 480px. */
  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .swg-dialog,
    .swg-toast {
      width: 100% !important;
      left: 0 !important;
      right: 0 !important;
      margin-inline-start: 0 !important;
    }
  }

  /**
  * Class applied to content page to disable scrolling.
  */
  html.swg-disable-scroll,
  html.swg-disable-scroll * {
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

<p class="wp-block-paragraph">In this tutorial, we implement an advanced <a href="https://github.com/optuna/optuna"><strong>Optuna</strong></a> workflow that systematically explores pruning, multi-objective optimization, custom callbacks, and rich visualization. Through each snippet, we see how Optuna helps us shape smarter search spaces, speed up experiments, and extract insights that guide model improvement. We work with real datasets, design efficient search strategies, and analyze trial behavior in a way that feels interactive, fast, and intuitive. Check out the <strong><a href="https://github.com/Marktechpost/AI-Tutorial-Codes-Included/blob/main/Computer%20Vision/optuna_advanced_hpo_marktechpost.py" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">FULL CODES here</a></strong>.</p>



<div class="dm-code-snippet dark dm-normal-version default no-background-mobile" snippet-height="" style="background-color:#abb8c3"><div class="control-language"><div class="dm-buttons"><div class="dm-buttons-left"><div class="dm-button-snippet red-button"></div><div class="dm-button-snippet orange-button"></div><div class="dm-button-snippet green-button"></div></div><div class="dm-buttons-right"><a id="dm-copy-raw-code"><span class="dm-copy-text">Copy Code</span><span class="dm-copy-confirmed" style="display:none">Copied</span><span class="dm-error-message" style="display:none">Use a different Browser</span></a></div></div><pre class="no-line-numbers language-php" tabindex="0"><code id="dm-code-raw" class="no-wrap language-php">import optuna

def <span class="token function">objective_with_pruning</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>trial<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>

       <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'min_samples_split'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'min_samples_split'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
       <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'min_samples_leaf'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'min_samples_leaf'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
       <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'subsample'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_float</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'subsample'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">0.6</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">1.0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
       <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'max_features'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_categorical</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'max_features'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'sqrt'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'log2'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> None<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
   <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
   model <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">GradientBoostingClassifier</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">**</span>params<span class="token punctuation">,</span> random_state<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">42</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   kf <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">KFold</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>n_splits<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> shuffle<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token constant boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> random_state<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">42</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   scores <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span>
   <span class="token keyword">for</span> fold<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>train_idx<span class="token punctuation">,</span> val_idx<span class="token punctuation">)</span> in <span class="token function">enumerate</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>kf<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">split</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token constant">X</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
       <span class="token class-name return-type">X_train</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> X_val <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token constant">X</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span>train_idx<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token constant">X</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span>val_idx<span class="token punctuation">]</span>
       y_train<span class="token punctuation">,</span> y_val <span class="token operator">=</span> y<span class="token punctuation">[</span>train_idx<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> y<span class="token punctuation">[</span>val_idx<span class="token punctuation">]</span>
       model<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">fit</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>X_train<span class="token punctuation">,</span> y_train<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
       score <span class="token operator">=</span> model<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">score</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>X_val<span class="token punctuation">,</span> y_val<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
       scores<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">append</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>score<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
       trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">report</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>np<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">mean</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> fold<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
       <span class="token keyword">if</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">should_prune</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
           <span class="token class-name return-type">raise</span> optuna<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">TrialPruned</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   <span class="token keyword">return</span> np<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">mean</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>scores<span class="token punctuation">)</span>


study1 <span class="token operator">=</span> optuna<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">create_study</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>

   pruner<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token function">MedianPruner</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>n_startup_trials<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">5</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> n_warmup_steps<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
<span class="token punctuation">)</span>
study1<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">optimize</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>objective_with_pruning<span class="token punctuation">,</span> n_trials<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">30</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> show_progress_bar<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token constant boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>


<span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>study1<span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">,</span> study1<span class="token operator">.</span>best_params<span class="token punctuation">)</span></code></pre></div></div>

<div class="dm-code-snippet dark dm-normal-version default no-background-mobile" snippet-height="" style="background-color:#abb8c3"><div class="control-language"><div class="dm-buttons"><div class="dm-buttons-left"><div class="dm-button-snippet red-button"></div><div class="dm-button-snippet orange-button"></div><div class="dm-button-snippet green-button"></div></div><div class="dm-buttons-right"><a id="dm-copy-raw-code"><span class="dm-copy-text">Copy Code</span><span class="dm-copy-confirmed" style="display:none">Copied</span><span class="dm-error-message" style="display:none">Use a different Browser</span></a></div></div><pre class="no-line-numbers language-php" tabindex="0"><code id="dm-code-raw" class="no-wrap language-php">def <span class="token function">multi_objective</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>trial<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>

   n_estimators <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'n_estimators'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">10</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">200</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   max_depth <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'max_depth'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   min_samples_split <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'min_samples_split'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">20</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   model <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">RandomForestClassifier</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>
       n_estimators<span class="token operator">=</span>n_estimators<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
       max_depth<span class="token operator">=</span>max_depth<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
       min_samples_split<span class="token operator">=</span>min_samples_split<span class="token punctuation">,</span>

   <span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   accuracy <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">cross_val_score</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>model<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token constant">X</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> y<span class="token punctuation">,</span> cv<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> scoring<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'accuracy'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> n_jobs<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">mean</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>

<span class="token punctuation">)</span>

<span class="token keyword">for</span> t in study2<span class="token operator">.</span>best_trials<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span><span class="token number">3</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>

<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We shift to a multi-objective setup where we optimize both accuracy and model complexity.        <span class="token keyword return-type">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>early_stopping_rounds <span class="token operator">=</span> early_stopping_rounds
       <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>direction <span class="token operator">=</span> direction
       <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>best_value <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword type-declaration">float</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'-inf'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token keyword">if</span> direction <span class="token operator">==</span> <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'maximize'</span> <span class="token keyword">else</span> <span class="token keyword type-declaration">float</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'inf'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
       <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
   def <span class="token function">__call__</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> study<span class="token punctuation">,</span> trial<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
       <span class="token keyword">if</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span>state <span class="token operator">!=</span> optuna<span class="token operator">.</span>trial<span class="token operator">.</span>TrialState<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token constant">COMPLETE</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
           <span class="token keyword">return</span>
       v <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span>value
       <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>direction <span class="token operator">==</span> <span class="token string single-quoted-string">'maximize'</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
           <span class="token keyword">if</span> v <span class="token operator">></span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
               <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">=</span> v<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
           <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
               <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
       <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
           <span class="token keyword">if</span> v <span class="token operator"><</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
               <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">=</span> v<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">0</span>
           <span class="token keyword">else</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
               <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">+=</span> <span class="token number">1</span>
       <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>counter <span class="token operator">>=</span> <span class="token keyword">self</span><span class="token operator">.</span>early_stopping_rounds<span class="token punctuation">:</span>
           study<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">stop</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>


def <span class="token function">objective_regression</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>trial<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">:</span>
   <span class="token class-name return-type">X</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> y <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">load_diabetes</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>return_X_y<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token constant boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   alpha <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_float</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'alpha'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">1e-3</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">10.0</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> log<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token constant boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   max_iter <span class="token operator">=</span> trial<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">suggest_int</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'max_iter'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token number">2000</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   from sklearn<span class="token operator">.</span>linear_model import Ridge
   model <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">Ridge</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>alpha<span class="token operator">=</span>alpha<span class="token punctuation">,</span> max_iter<span class="token operator">=</span>max_iter<span class="token punctuation">,</span> random_state<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">42</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   score <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">cross_val_score</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>model<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token constant">X</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> y<span class="token punctuation">,</span> cv<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">5</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> scoring<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'neg_mean_squared_error'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> n_jobs<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token number">1</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">mean</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
   <span class="token keyword">return</span> <span class="token operator">-</span>score


early_stopping <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token function">EarlyStoppingCallback</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>early_stopping_rounds<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">15</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> direction<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'minimize'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
study3 <span class="token operator">=</span> optuna<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">create_study</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>direction<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token string single-quoted-string">'minimize'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> sampler<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token function">TPESampler</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>seed<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">42</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>
study3<span class="token operator">.</span><span class="token function">optimize</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>objective_regression<span class="token punctuation">,</span> n_trials<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token number">100</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> callbacks<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token punctuation">[</span>early_stopping<span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> show_progress_bar<span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token constant boolean">True</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span>


<span class="token keyword">print</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>study3<span class="token operator">.</span>best_value<span class="token punctuation">,</span> study3<span class="token operator">.</span>best_params<span class="token punctuation">)</span></code></pre></div></div>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We introduce our own early-stopping callback and connect it to a regression objective. We observe how the study stops itself when progress stalls, saving time and compute. This makes us feel the power of customizing Optuna’s flow to match real-world training behavior. <p class="wp-block-paragraph">We summarize key results from all three studies, reviewing accuracy, pruning efficiency, Pareto solutions, and regression MSE. Seeing everything condensed into a few lines gives us a clear sense of our optimization journey. We now feel confident in extending and adapting this setup for more advanced experiments.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">In conclusion, we have gained an understanding of how to build powerful hyperparameter optimization pipelines that extend far beyond simple single-metric tuning. We combine pruning, Pareto optimization, early stopping, and analysis tools to form a complete and flexible workflow. We now feel confident in adapting this template for any future <a href="https://www.marktechpost.com/2025/01/14/what-is-machine-learning-ml/" target="_blank">ML</a> or DL model we want to optimize, knowing we now have a clear and practical blueprint for high-quality Optuna-based experimentation.</p>

<script>
(function(){
  var API="https://www.marktechpost.com/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?per_page=10&_embed=wp:term";
  var MAX=6;
  var ORGS=["NVIDIA","OpenAI","Open AI","Google DeepMind","DeepMind","Google","Anthropic","Apple","Microsoft","Mistral","Perplexity","Cursor","Hugging Face","Alibaba","Qwen","DeepSeek","Cohere","Stability AI","xAI","Amazon","IBM","Tencent","ByteDance","Moonshot","Baidu","Snowflake","Databricks","Salesforce","Adobe","Runway","Black Forest Labs","DeepReinforce","Meta","Nous","Allen Institute","AI2","Liquid AI","Together AI","Sakana","Reka","Inflection","Character"];
  var OPEN=/open[-\s]?source|open[-\s]?weight|weights|dataset|gguf|checkpoint/i;
  var FALLBACK=[
    {org:"Meta",date:"Jun 27",title:"Astryx: a React design system agents can read",tags:[["Open Source",1],["MCP",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"},
    {org:"NVIDIA",date:"Jun 26",title:"Open-SWE-Traces for supervised fine-tuning",tags:[["Dataset",1],["Agents",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"},
    {org:"OpenAI",date:"Jun 26",title:"GPT-5.6 preview: Sol, Terra and Luna tiers",tags:[["Preview",0],["API",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"},
    {org:"Apple",date:"Jun 26",title:"container: run Linux VMs on Apple Silicon",tags:[["Open Source",1],["Swift",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"},
    {org:"Cursor",date:"Jun 26",title:"Reward hacking inflates SWE-bench Pro scores",tags:[["Research",0],["Paper",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"},
    {org:"DeepReinforce",date:"Jun 25",title:"Ornith-1.0: a coding model that learns its own RL scaffolds",tags:[["Open Weights",1],["Coding",0]],link:"https://www.marktechpost.com/"}
  ];
  function dec(s){var t=document.createElement("textarea");t.innerHTML=s;return t.value;}
  function esc(s){return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;");}
  function findOrg(t){for(var i=0;i<ORGS.length;i++){var r=new RegExp("(^|[^a-z])"+ORGS[i].replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,"\\$&")+"([^a-z]|$)","i");if(r.test(t))return ORGS[i];}var m=t.match(/^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9.]+)/);return m?m[1]:"AI";}
  function cleanTitle(t,org){var r=new RegExp("^"+org.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,"\\$&")+"(['\u2019]s)?\\s+","i");t=t.replace(r,"");t=t.replace(/^(Meet|Introducing|Releasing)\s+/i,"");if(t.length>78)t=t.slice(0,76).replace(/\s+\S*$/,"")+"\u2026";return t.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+t.slice(1);}
  function fmtDate(iso){var d=new Date(iso);var mo=["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"];return mo[d.getMonth()]+" "+d.getDate();}
  function pickCat(post){try{var terms=post._embedded["wp:term"][0]||[];var skip=/uncategorized|editor|pick|news/i;for(var i=0;i<terms.length;i++){if(!skip.test(terms[i].name))return terms[i].name;}if(terms[0])return terms[0].name;}catch(e){}return "AI";}
  function shortCat(c){c=c.replace(/Artificial Intelligence/i,"AI").replace(/\s*\/\s*Weights/i,"").replace(/Large Language Models?/i,"LLM");if(c.length>16)c=c.slice(0,15)+"\u2026";return c;}
  function card(it){
    var tagHtml="";for(var i=0;i<it.tags.length;i++){tagHtml+='<span class="vd-tag'+(it.tags[i][1]?" open":"")+'">'+esc(it.tags[i][0])+'</span>';}
    return '<a class="vd-card" href="'+esc(it.link)+'" target="_top"><div class="vd-org"><span class="vd-mono">'+esc(it.org)+'</span><span class="vd-date">'+esc(it.date)+'</span></div><p class="vd-title">'+esc(it.title)+'</p><div class="vd-tags">'+tagHtml+'</div></a>';
  }
  function render(items){
    var list=document.getElementById("vdList");var h="";
    for(var i=0;i<items.length&&i<MAX;i++){h+=card(items[i]);}
    list.innerHTML=h;sizeUp();
  }
  function sizeUp(){
    try{
      var f=document.querySelector(".vd");
      var h=f.offsetHeight+18;
      if(window.parent)window.parent.postMessage({mtpDropsSidebarHeight:h},"*");
    }catch(e){}
  }
  function load(){
    var done=false;
    var to=setTimeout(function(){if(!done){done=true;render(FALLBACK);}},4000);
    try{
      fetch(API,{credentials:"omit"}).then(function(r){return r.json();}).then(function(posts){
        if(done)return;done=true;clearTimeout(to);
        if(!posts||!posts.length){render(FALLBACK);return;}
        var items=[];
        for(var i=0;i<posts.length&&items.length<MAX;i++){
          var p=posts[i];
          var title=dec((p.title&&p.title.rendered)||"");
          if(!title)continue;
          var org=findOrg(title);
          var cat=pickCat(p);
          var isOpen=OPEN.test(cat)||OPEN.test(title);
          items.push({org:org,date:fmtDate(p.date),title:cleanTitle(title,org),tags:[[shortCat(cat),isOpen?1:0]],link:p.link});
        }
        render(items.length?items:FALLBACK);
      }).catch(function(){if(!done){done=true;clearTimeout(to);render(FALLBACK);}});
